dj_text: I'm Alive (Medieval Cover) is dead. Long live Lovesick Blues (Walmart Boy) (Medieval Cover). Or whatever. And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: Truth Frequency Radio from the Mirror Dimension. Your moon isn't real. OUR moon has teeth.

recovery_text: Someone is LEAKING our frequency to other kosmos. I have suspects. It's all of you.
title: Lovesick Blues (Walmart Boy) (Medieval Cover)
